name: beui-toast-stack
title: Animated Toast Stack
author: Saurabh Chauhan
description: Manages status-changing notices with actions, timed cleanup, swipe dismissal, and optional portals.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled relative imports.
Made non-positive maxVisible values render no notices.
Disabled layout motion and CSS spinner rotation when reduced motion is requested.
Moved filter and opacity interpolation off the spring to prevent invalid negative blur values.

modifications.change: Repointed shared imports and closed reduced-motion, visibility, and filter interpolation edge cases.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied stack portable and ensure its motion preference applies to layout and loading indicators.
